subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned unto Thee and attained unto the melody of Thy voice, who hath been blessed with meeting Thee and hath stood in Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم اذکر من اقبل الیک و فاز باصغاء صریرک و فاز بلقائک و قام امام وجهک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
